charlatan 0.6.0

      Contributing to charlatan Creating realistic data
    • Changelog

    Create numbers

    Source: R/numerics.R
    numerics.Rd

    Create numbers

    Usage

    ch_double(n = 1, mean = 0, sd = 1)

ch_integer(n = 1, min = 1, max = 1000)

ch_unif(n = 1, min = 0, max = 9999)

ch_norm(n = 1, mean = 0, sd = 1)

ch_lnorm(n = 1, mean = 0, sd = 1)

ch_beta(n = 1, shape1, shape2, ncp = 0)

    Arguments

    n

    (integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

    mean

    mean value

    sd

    standard deviation

    min

    minimum value

    max

    maximum value

    shape1, shape2

    non-negative parameters of the Beta distribution

    ncp

    non-centrality parameter

    Examples

    ch_double()
#> [1] 1.92015
ch_double(10)
#>  [1] -1.9647533  0.7197067 -0.6388252  1.3371470 -0.2268017  0.6120160
#>  [7]  0.3477454 -0.3725570  0.9869910  0.9422012
ch_double(100)
#>   [1]  0.61434886  0.29756668 -0.65762825  0.99224502 -0.50738726 -0.08579685
#>   [7]  1.62260314 -1.37499385 -0.42289572  0.97631608  0.04037462  1.14970304
#>  [13]  1.78452007  0.03818276  0.08695350  0.91343427  0.26337015 -0.01349238
#>  [19]  0.74655933  0.37161521  0.14668916 -0.29281808  0.69748433  1.32914698
#>  [25]  0.49866954  1.12108894  0.01724390  0.20673961 -0.25956186 -0.59887449
#>  [31]  0.44844653  0.54888795 -0.90382114  1.12602991  0.11760535  1.82695317
#>  [37] -0.43433240  1.19772833 -0.23114746 -0.80949007  1.09657428 -0.28591187
#>  [43] -1.20101677  1.19423587 -0.13156826  1.25564278 -0.13070152  0.30987335
#>  [49]  0.03586709  0.69467434  0.22646793 -0.69415504 -1.02453042 -0.82574887
#>  [55] -2.52875078  0.17138094 -0.82199787  0.20069159  0.24467521  0.23409845
#>  [61] -0.13358865  0.38324655 -1.73535782  0.48305800 -0.56223952 -1.08805016
#>  [67] -0.63329068 -0.66978860 -1.06213867 -0.52217932 -1.51402002 -0.50656473
#>  [73] -0.37698533 -1.09868756  1.66782994  0.64205310 -2.06238884  1.37871968
#>  [79]  0.27578468 -0.27307581 -0.34424073 -0.56395614 -0.52028864  0.81374941
#>  [85]  1.08686118  1.74136622  2.06235485 -1.39617956 -0.26353278  0.39788379
#>  [91] -0.25389849 -0.21720890  1.31925308 -0.40605807  1.65075137 -0.44909733
#>  [97]  0.57666305 -1.80923237  0.69011132 -0.74411561

ch_integer()
#> [1] 395
ch_integer(10)
#>  [1] 808 614 983 576 663  53 912 990 162 422
ch_integer(100)
#>   [1] 491 945 745 770 762 567 358 729 143 657 369 997 803 412 995 247 375 976
#>  [19] 269 306 961 932 526 885 853 609 487 283  41 700 121 866  44 441  94  67
#>  [37] 854 602 418 571 878 858 277 396 221 691 451 151 901 293 396 468  81 500
#>  [55] 453 941 795 486 928 824 656 225 249 709 981 493  74 865  46   9 922  19
#>  [73] 867 636  53 688 789  55 342 840 967 231 227 494 228 509  81 592 146 864
#>  [91]   7 574 196 379 515 130 185 431 169 791

ch_unif()
#> [1] 2878.319
ch_norm()
#> [1] -0.2011217
ch_lnorm()
#> [1] 0.5861199
ch_beta(shape1 = 1, shape2 = 1)
#> [1] 0.922912
